title: Verify UI Progression: Widget changes to floating pill after Day 1
description: Tests that the entry point on the homepage correctly changes from a persistent widget to a floating pill on Day 2 of the trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.
The user's trial is now on Day 2.

steps.description: 1. Log in and navigate to the Homepage.
2. Observe the UI element for accessing the Trial Corner.

expected_result: The persistent header widget from Day 0/1 is no longer present. A floating pill is now displayed on the homepage as the entry point to the Trial Corner.
